# CLAUDE.md — Blended & Unfiltered
### Generated by SkemaLS | April 1, 2026
### This file lives in the root of your project folder.
### Claude Code reads this automatically every session.
### Never delete this file. Never rename it.

---

## WHAT THIS SITE IS

**Show:** Blended & Unfiltered
**Host:** Carrie Bollock
**Domain:** PENDING — update when confirmed
**Built by:** SkemaLS (camden@pinedaleproperties.com)

**Purpose:**
Episode hub and audience platform for a podcast about real stories from
blended families, mental health, and faith-rooted resilience.

**The one action every visitor should take:**
Subscribe to the email list.

**Primary audience:**
Podcast listeners and potential guests — phone-first, drawn by a specific
topic or Carrie's credibility, looking to subscribe or share their story.

---

## TECH STACK — DO NOT CHANGE THESE

- Framework: Next.js 14 with App Router
- Styling: Tailwind CSS 3
- Language: TypeScript
- Hosting: Vercel (auto-deploys on push to GitHub main branch)
- Fonts: Oswald (headings), Lato (body) — loaded via next/font/google

**Rules for every session:**
1. All copy lives in `content/siteContent.ts` — edit text there, never in page files
2. All images go in `/public/images/` — reference them in siteContent.ts
3. No new npm packages without flagging it first
4. Run `npm run build` before saying any change is complete
5. Test at 375px mobile width before marking any visual change done
6. Never delete or overwrite CLAUDE.md

---

## DESIGN SYSTEM — LOCKED

**Style:** Bold typographic warmth — high contrast, Oswald-dominant,
alternating dark and ivory sections.

**Colors:**
```
Primary dark bg:       #1C1C1C  (True Black)
Text on dark:          #F7F0E8  (Ivory Warm)
Text on light:         #1C1C1C  (True Black)
Text secondary:        #3D3D3D  (Dark Charcoal)
Accent / CTAs:         #C1440E  (Rust Red)
Secondary accent:      #E8AA42  (Amber Gold)
Card surface (dark):   #2A2A2A
Light section bg:      #F7F0E8
```

**Fonts:**
```
Heading: Oswald, weights 600 and 700
Body:    Lato, weights 400 and 700
```

**Spacing base unit:** 8px — all spacing is a multiple of 8px

**Animation:** Scroll fade-up on episode cards and content sections;
Rust Red hover state on all CTAs and episode card titles. No auto-play.
No carousels.

**Mobile-first:** Design begins at 375px. Desktop is the expansion.

---

## SITE STRUCTURE
```
/                   Home
/about              About Carrie
/episodes           Episode Archive
/share-your-story   Guest Submission Form
/connect            Podcast platforms + email subscribe + social
```

Every page must have:
- A single primary headline (Oswald, dominant size)
- At least one CTA linking to /connect or the email subscribe form
- Proper metadata (title and description in siteContent.ts)

---

## CONTENT — WHERE EVERYTHING LIVES

All text is in: `content/siteContent.ts`

To update any text on any page — find it in siteContent.ts, edit it there.
Never hunt through page or component files to change copy.

**Structure of siteContent.ts:**
- `site` — name, tagline, url, email, logo
- `nav` — navigation links
- `home` — hero, mission statement, featured episode reference
- `about` — Carrie's story, credentials, show mission
- `episodes` — array of episode objects (title, number, date, description, platforms, thumbnail)
- `guestForm` — form headlines, mission statement, field labels
- `connect` — platform links, social links
- `footer` — links, legal text

---

## SECURITY — DO NOT MODIFY

Security headers are in `next.config.ts`. Do not edit without flagging it.

Environment variables (API keys, email credentials) are in Vercel dashboard
under Settings → Environment Variables. Never paste a key into a code file.

The guest submission form uses:
- Honeypot field (bots fill it, humans don't — submissions with it filled
  are silently discarded)
- Server-side validation on all fields
- Rate limiting to prevent spam

---

## HOW TO DEPLOY A CHANGE

1. Make the change in Claude Code
2. Claude Code runs `npm run build` — confirm no errors
3. Claude Code runs `git add . && git commit -m "[description]" && git push`
4. Vercel auto-deploys — site updates within 60 seconds
5. Check the live site to confirm the change looks correct

If build fails, do not push. Fix the error first.

---

## CONTENT UPDATE SCRIPTS

Copy and paste these into Claude Code for common tasks.

**Update any headline or copy:**
"In siteContent.ts, find the [section name] headline and change it to:
[new text]. Show me the field you're editing before making the change."

**Add a new episode:**
"In siteContent.ts, add a new episode to the episodes array:
Title: [episode title]
Episode number: [number]
Season: [season number]
Date: [mm/dd/yyyy]
Description: [2-3 sentence description]
Thumbnail: [filename — place file in /public/images/ first]
Platforms: Spotify: [url], Apple: [url]
Show me the existing episode format first so the new one matches."

**Update a platform link:**
"In siteContent.ts, find the [platform name] link in the connect section
and update the URL to: [new URL]."

**Add a social link:**
"In siteContent.ts, add a new social link to the connect.social array:
Platform: [name]
URL: [url]
Show me the existing format before adding."

**Change the subscribe CTA text:**
"In siteContent.ts, find the subscribe CTA headline and button text in
the home section and change them to: [new text]. Show me both fields
before editing."

**Update Carrie's bio:**
"In siteContent.ts, find the about.story section and update the
[paragraph number] paragraph to: [new text]. Show me the current text
first."

---

## WHAT REQUIRES CAMDEN

Contact Camden (camden@pinedaleproperties.com) when:
- The site goes down and the rollback doesn't fix it
- Claude Code wants to install a new package or change the stack
- A new third-party integration needs to be added (affects security headers)
- Something looks broken across multiple pages at the same time
- Any change involving the guest submission form or email delivery

Do not contact Camden for: episode additions, bio updates, headline changes,
platform link updates, social link updates, or any change that only touches
`siteContent.ts`.

---

## WHEN SOMETHING BREAKS

**Site is showing an error:**
1. Go to vercel.com → your project → Deployments
2. Find the last deployment with a green checkmark
3. Click the three dots → "Promote to Production"
4. Site restored. Email Camden: subject "B&U Site Error — Rolled Back to [date]"

**A change looks wrong on mobile:**
"The [element] looks wrong on my phone. Fix how it appears at 375px
mobile width."

**Can't find a piece of text:**
"Find where it says [exact text] in siteContent.ts and show me
the field name before changing it."
